## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Start the environment using '...'
2. Go to '...'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or copy/paste server error logs to help explain your problem.

## Environment:
 - OS: [e.g. Ubuntu Linux, Windows 11]
 - Browser (if applicable): [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
 - Module affected: [e.g. shield-auth, shield-ledger]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
